lists.1: Maximum clutch travel switch not active

V_TM_TimeAtOpening_mem.comment: Variable which contains the time of the last opening of the BDU during parking time (bad SOC)

lists.1: Test Ok (Difference between actual and calculated value of BATT_Voltage_Sense is not more than 0.3)
lists.2: Test NOK(Difference between actual and calculated value of BATT_Voltage_Sense is more than 0.3)

V_B_AlertBDU.comment: Related to the model variable "V_B_AlerteBDU", which should become named "V_B_AlertBDU", too!

lists.0: Running in idle mode or stopped

BatteryWarning.comment: Content may be received from the model variable "SUSMAppl305_Relational_Operator".

lists.0: Oil Pressure Failure is not inhibited

Output Digital Control List.comment: All digital outputs of the ECU

lists.0: counting and storage of CAN mute/absent failures  masked
lists.1: counting and storage of CAN mute/absent failures not masked

lists.0: No oil pressure switch fault warning requested
lists.1: Oil pressure switch fault warning requested

E_B_EEM_FailureInhibition.comment: Bits are not yet defined at models! EEPROM space has been already occupied.

lists.0: Primary ign supply relay ctrl OFF
lists.1: Primary ign supply relay ctrl ON

lists.0: no inhibition of neutral contact never reached diagnosis
lists.1: inhibition of neutral contact never reached diagnosis

I_ENERGY_BATTERY_VOLTAGE.comment: Value range is 0 to 16V. Corresponds to C5 RSA batt_voltage_sense

I_BATT1_VOLTAGE_POS_BDU.comment: filtered "AI_BATT1" Corresponds to batt1_voltage_sense in RSA C6 xml file

lists.3: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.3: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

lists.2: Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Range/Performance
lists.3: Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Low
lists.4: Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit High
lists.6: Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit Low
lists.7: Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit High

DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data) Not applicable

DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data) Not applica

DTCExtendedData.Mileage.comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data) Applicable

lists.0: No activation of IHM Low battery voltage
lists.1: Activation of IHM Low battery voltage

C_TM_LowSpeedWipingProtection.comment: timeout of low speed wiping protection

C_TM_HighSpeedWipingProtection.comment: timeout of high speed wiping protection

C_TM_HighSpeedPeriod_limit_max.comment: detection wiping period of stress high speed

C_TM_LowSpeedPeriod_limit_max.comment: detection wiping period of stress low speed (blocking)

lists.0: No direct compressor activation from ECM is used
lists.1: Direct compressor activation from ECM is used

lists.0: neutral contact diagnosis (algo plausibility) is inhibited
lists.1: neutral contact diagnosis (algo plausibility) is not inhibited

lists.0: No auto stop blocked reached protection

DI_IGN_RR.comment: Corresponds to Ignition_Ddiag in RSA C6 xml file

lists.0: The BDU alert can only be erased by diag tool
lists.1: The BDU alert disappears once the failure had

lists.0: Allows to switch OFF Ignition when VehicleSpeed is >0
lists.1: Inhibits from switching OFF Ignition when VehicleSpeed is >0

C_TM_LBEAM_SCG_Fail_max.comment: Timout for Low Beam failure detection to decide that the SCG failure is present

C_TM_DTRL_SCG_Fail_max.comment: Timout for DTRL failure detection to decide that the SCG failure is present

C_I_LBEAM_HAL_min.comment: minimum current for LOW BEAM for Halogen lamps  [0;0.1;5]  LSB: 0.1 OFF:  0 MIN/MAX:  0 .. 5 */;

C_I_LBEAM_HID_min.comment: minimum current for HID lamps [0;0.1;5] LSB: 0.1 OFF:  0 MIN/MAX:  0 .. 5 */;

C_I_DTRL_min.comment: minimum current for DTRL  LSB: 0.1 OFF:  0 MIN/MAX:  0 .. 5 */;

C_I_LBEAM_HAL_max_A.comment: 25 A default Max current for Low Beam Halogen A

C_I_LBEAM_HAL_max_B.comment: 8 A default Max current for Low Beam Halogen B

C_I_LBEAM_HID_max_A.comment: 25 A default Max current for Low Beam HID A

C_I_LBEAM_HID_max_B.comment: 12 A default Max current for Low Beam HID B

C_I_LBEAM_HID_max_C.comment: 5 A default Max current for Low Beam HID C

lists.0: No BDU command line failure - in
